title: Pan-Seared Haddock with Russian Twist
description: A flavorful and moist haddock dish with a hint of Russian spices. Serve with a side of bitter greens for a delicious and well-rounded meal.

ingredients.name: Russian seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: 1. Rinse the haddock fillets under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Season the haddock with Russian seasoning blend, making sure to coat both sides evenly.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the haddock fillets to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Remove the haddock from the skillet and set aside to rest.
6. Add a squeeze of lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Serve the haddock with a side of bitter greens and a squeeze of lemon juice.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or dill, if desired.
